title: trembleya laniflora
intro: Trembleya laniflora, also known as the woolly trembleya, is a flowering plant species native to the Andes mountain range in South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trembleya laniflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Trembleya laniflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
